name: milesight-iot-am307l
description: Milesight am307l collects various indoor ambience conditions through 7 built-in sensors and delivers the data to the mobile App and its 4.2-inch E-ink screen. It supports batteries or DC power supply and can be easily equipped via NFC.
author: Thinger.io
